name: Cheeseless Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks and combine with the sweetened condensed milk. Add lemon rind, juice, vanilla, and nutmeg. Blend well.
2. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites. Set aside.
3. Combine the melted butter and zweiback crumbs. Sprinkle the butter and half the crumbs into an 8-inch square or 9-inch round cake pan. Pour in the reserved filling mixture and sprinkle with the remaining crumbs.
4. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat and let cool in the oven with the door closed for one hour.
6. Makes 8 servings.
